summary: Completed comprehensive testing of EVO external booking system. All major features working correctly including official logo display, external user booking flow with 4 steps, price comparison, member vs external pricing, and proper API integration.
passed_tests: Official EVO logo displays correctly in header and footer
External users can access /robihuette/buchen without login
External booking shows 'Sie buchen als Gast (Externer Preis)' banner
Price comparison shows both member (CHF 80) and external (CHF 120) prices
External booking has 4 steps: Date → Event Details → Contact Info → Summary
Step 3 for external users collects name, email, phone
Step 3 shows 'Tipp: Als Mitglied sparen Sie...' message
External booking confirmation shows 'Anfrage gesendet' status
Registered user booking still works with member pricing
Member booking shows 3 steps (no contact info step)
Backend API /api/bookings/check-prices showing both member and external prices
External bookings marked as 'pending' status and 'is_external: true'
Price calculation logic working for both user types
